method_values.T2V: text-to-video for low identity risk or simple environment motion
method_values.I2V: image-to-video with character, costume, location or composition reference
method_values.FLF2V: first-last-frame video for constrained motion endpoint or transition
method_values.REFERENCE_IMAGE: still reference, insert plate, title card or exact-text/post plate
method_values.REDRAW: masked redraw/inpaint for precise register text, marks or prop details

batching_groups.dependency: needs border wall, same exterior gate direction, gatehouse bell sound, Xue Linqiang and localized siege reference frames
needs Jinhe grain depot location plate, grain tax clerk, slave soldier and household prop boards
needs southern red-line room, Gu Huaizhang, Yan Nanzhi shadow state and old relay map props
needs Canyangao gate geography, Shen family, register clerk, wax flags and Qingming incense
needs medicine house interior, cabinet compartment, Yan Nanzhi hidden state, Luo Qinghe and old relay mark
needs old well/table geography, Bai Yi, insect-wax needle, precise register inserts and bowstring ending

audio_refs: voiceover:肃明一千两百二十六年，北方大雪。
shots.rationale: 使用 R001/R002 首尾参考帧锁定同一面锁喉关黑石墙、同一城门和同一墙外朝向；保留当前正中对称史诗攻城建立风格，以墙外低机位前推、R002 更近靠近城门的第一次重撞和门楼内骨钟声作为转场。第一镜不强制画面出现骨钟或钟架，不再要求到墙头转向。
新版 R003 需要锁定年轻军户被撞门余震晃倒、半倒墙边、武器脱手、旁边骨钟横摆的身体代价瞬间；旧扶钟首帧需要重生。
薛临墙身份、冻裂手和旧墙师质感需要角色参考约束。
粮袋墙、粮税小吏和村民层级需要地点与角色参考。

composition_lock.zh: 横屏远景按同一泥地上的真实身高差构图：粮袋墙占上半画面并压低天空，粮税小吏站在车道泥地偏中位置，凭 190-210cm 虫族身高压过村民，白册夹板、骨算盘和粮牌形成亮色制度中心；纯虫族小兵 200-230cm 持械封住车道边缘，村民被压成下方窄带，押车通道从右前向左后退进，保留粮仓纵深。
composition_lock.en: Landscape wide composition built on true same-ground height hierarchy: the grain-sack wall occupies the upper half and suppresses the sky, the grain tax clerk stands near center on the same muddy cart lane and towers over villagers through his 190-210 cm insect-official body, while the white register board, bone abacus and grain tags form the bright bureaucratic center; 200-230 cm pure insect infantry hold weapons at the lane edges, villagers are compressed into a low band, and the cart lane recedes from front-right to rear-left for depot depth.

camera_lock.zh: 从村民眼高真实速度缓慢推进，推进时粮尘和人群只轻微让开，终点停在粮税小吏与白册夹板的层级关系上，不升空、不追美景。
camera_lock.en: A slow real-time push from villager eye height; grain dust and crowd layers only part slightly as the camera moves, ending on the hierarchy between clerk and white register board, with no crane move or beauty-plate drift.

lighting_plan.zh: 柔和清晨冷雾作主环境光，低角度逆光穿过粮尘切出粮袋墙、小吏高帽和白册轮廓，窄侧光擦过麻布、湿木和河泥纹理；虫蜡白只作为白册和粮牌的小亮点。少量丁达尔光用于粮尘纵深，不能做成特效光柱。
lighting_plan.en: Soft morning cold haze acts as the ambient key. Low-angle backlight passes through grain dust to rim the sack wall, clerk hat and register board, while a narrow side light grazes burlap, wet wood and river-mud texture; insect-wax white stays as small highlights on the register and grain tags. Subtle Tyndall light may deepen grain-dust space, never becoming VFX beams.

identity_height_scale_lock_2026_06_11.source: bible/characters.md functional-role height locks plus user visual QC rejection on 2026-06-11
required_scale_ladder: C025 ordinary human baseline: children 105-145cm, youths 145-165cm, ordinary adults 160-190cm, elders visually shorter from stoop.
C017 mixed slave soldier: canon range 170-200cm; SC002 representative should read 175-185cm and always below the selected C016/C018 on screen.
C016 low insect official: canon range 190-210cm; representative screen height about 200cm, taller than villagers and C017 by true body height, narrow and non-combat.
C018 pure insect infantry: canon range 200-230cm; representative standing-equivalent about 220cm, visibly taller and more alien than C016/C017/C025, armed perimeter only.
C019 heavy insect soldier: canon range 220-260cm; representative about 245cm, broader and heavier than C018, shield-wall or gate-pressure only.
identity_height_scale_lock_2026_06_11.same_ground_rule: Feet, soles, claws or ground-contact points must align on one visible baseline or one continuous muddy ground plane; height difference may not be created by tables, platforms, stairs, grain sacks, carts, threshold steps, foreground enlargement, lens distortion or crop tricks.
identity_height_scale_lock_2026_06_11.camera_rule: For cards, include one same-ground scale lineup strip with ruler ticks or doorway/human baseline. For reference frames, keep camera distance and ground plane readable enough that C025/C017/C016/C018/C019 hierarchy can be checked without guessing.
identity_height_scale_lock_2026_06_11.role_boundary_rule: C016 opens/registers/orders, C017 grips/moves grain with five hardened human fingers, C018 blocks routes with weapons, C019 guards gates with shield mass, C025 remains ordinary humans with no insect features.
rejection_rules: reject if C016, C017, C018 and C025 read as the same height class
reject if C017 becomes a pure insect, metal-glove guard, ordinary human soldier or loses the low money-tail braid/hardened five-finger hand
reject if C016 becomes a human accountant, blue high official, priest, slave soldier or combat soldier
reject if C018 lacks reverse-jointed legs, claw feet, pure-insect body or visible spear/hook-sickle when guarding
reject if C019 does not read broader/heavier than C018 when present
reject if C025 civilians gain insect traits or military gear
reject if apparent height comes from platform, table, stairs, grain sacks, cart bed, foreground scale or crouch hiding true standing-equivalent height

shots.rationale: 儿童手印与祖牌小盒为敏感道具，需要参考帧避免误读。

composition_lock.zh: 门槛压迫特写组用斜线构图：前景是倒出的半斗杂粮、湿泥和祖牌小盒，画面一侧切入奴兵骨白腕绑和扣腕手，孩子手印落在虫蜡封条上；老人和孩子只给局部姿态，不做猎奇正脸。背景保留粮袋墙和低位人群的模糊压力。
composition_lock.en: The coercive threshold close-up uses diagonal pressure: foreground holds spilled half-measure grain, wet mud and the ancestral tablet box; one side of frame cuts in the slave soldier bone-white wrist binding and gripping hand, with the child handprint on the insect-wax seal. Elder and child are shown as partial body language, not exploitative front faces. Background keeps a blurred pressure of grain sacks and low crowd.

camera_lock.zh: 手持后退一步，跟随粮缸被掀、老人护盒和手被按下的真实接触反作用；运动短、低、近，动作完成后立刻稳住。
camera_lock.en: A one-step handheld pullback follows the real contact reaction of the jar tipped over, the elder guarding the box and the hand pressed down; the move is short, low and close, settling as soon as the action lands.

lighting_plan.zh: 门外清晨柔光托住人物安全感，窄侧光从门槛斜切，强化湿泥、木缸、粗布、祖牌盒和奴兵腕绑纹理；虫蜡封条上有小面积冷白顶光，制造制度压迫，但避开孩子眼窝。底光只允许作为泥水反光的极弱火场感，不大面积使用。
lighting_plan.en: Soft morning light from outside preserves restraint around the people, while a narrow side light cuts across the threshold to strengthen wet mud, wooden jar, coarse cloth, tablet box and slave-soldier wrist-binding textures. A small cold-white top light sits on the insect-wax seal to create bureaucratic oppression without darkening the child eye sockets. Bottom light is only a faint mud-water reflection, never broad.

shots.rationale: 官吏开册、妇人被扣和封牌敲下要求层级清晰。

composition_lock.zh: 检查桌中景按“前景证据、中景执行、背景压力”三层构图：前景高细节是白册册页、节状手指、粮牌、虫蜡封条、骨算盘和湿木桌沿；中景是粮税小吏高帽、被扣妇人、奴兵扣腕和粮袋侧面；背景只保留粮袋墙、检查口、低位村民和清晨冷雾。
composition_lock.en: The medium inspection-table shot uses three layers: foreground evidence, midground enforcement, background pressure. Foreground high detail holds register pages, segmented fingers, grain tag, insect-wax seal, bone abacus and wet-wood table edge; midground holds the clerk tall hat, pinned woman, slave-soldier grip and grain sack side; background keeps only grain-sack wall, inspection opening, low villagers and morning cold haze.

camera_lock.zh: 静态制度镜头，正面略高于桌沿，只有手、封牌小槌、妇人护粮和奴兵扣腕移动；台词只表现说话状态，不让模型生成字幕或口型精确文字。
camera_lock.en: A locked bureaucratic frame, frontal and slightly above table edge; only hands, seal-hammer, the woman guarding grain and slave-soldier grip move. Dialogue is only a speaking state, with no generated subtitles or exact lip text.

lighting_plan.zh: 虫蜡白顶光压在白册和小吏脸壳上，形成冷酷制度感，并故意让小吏眼窝更暗；但用窄侧光擦亮节状手指、妇人手腕、旧木桌纹、粮袋麻布和奴兵皮甲，保证皮肤/甲片/石木纹理可读。小槌落点可用小面积硬光，逆光只给高帽、肩线和冷雾轮廓，避免圣光化。
lighting_plan.en: Cold insect-wax top light presses onto the register and clerk face shell, creating a cruel bureaucratic feeling and deliberately darkening the clerk eye sockets; a narrow side light still grazes segmented fingers, the woman wrist, old table grain, burlap sack and slave-soldier leather armor so skin, armor and wood textures remain readable. The seal-hammer landing point may take a small hard highlight; backlight only rims hat, shoulders and cold haze, never becoming sacred.

shots.rationale: 押车离开和家门留空需要终点构图锁定。

composition_lock.zh: FLF2V 首帧到终帧使用同一门槛后方三分构图：首帧前景是祖牌小盒、虫蜡冷白手印和泥水，粮袋正被拖上车；中景妇人与孩子低在门槛，奴兵和车轮横向离开；终帧车已退到远处冷雾里，前景仍是空门槛、祖牌盒和车辙，家门还在但家粮不在。
composition_lock.en: The FLF2V first-to-last frames use the same rear-threshold thirds composition: first frame foreground holds tablet box, cold-white wax handprint and mud water as grain sacks are dragged onto the cart; midground keeps woman and child low at the threshold while slave soldiers and cart wheels exit laterally. By the last frame the cart recedes into cold haze, foreground remains empty threshold, tablet box and wheel ruts: the doorway stands but household grain is gone.

camera_lock.zh: 粮车和奴兵横向离开，镜头不追车，固定在家门后方并极慢后收，强调“粮走了，家留空”；尾段让车轮声盖过哭声。
camera_lock.en: The cart and slave soldiers exit laterally while the camera does not chase; it holds behind the household threshold with a very slow pullback, stressing that grain leaves while the home remains hollow. Wheel sound overtakes crying at the end.

lighting_plan.zh: 清晨低角逆光从押车离开的方向打出粮袋、车轮、奴兵肩线和冷雾轮廓，增加电影感和空气感；侧光掠过泥水、车辙、祖牌盒和麻袋，强化触感。妇人和孩子只吃柔和天光，不用硬光审判；虫蜡手印保持小面积冷白亮点。丁达尔光只沿车道给纵深，不能盖住家门。
lighting_plan.en: Low morning backlight from the cart-exit direction rims sacks, wheels, slave-soldier shoulders and cold haze for cinema and air; side light skims mud water, wheel ruts, tablet box and burlap for tactile texture. Woman and child receive only soft sky light, not hard judgmental light; the insect-wax handprint stays a small cold-white highlight. Tyndall light only follows the cart lane for depth and must not cover the doorway.

shots.rationale: 旧驿残图、红线方向和纸面材质必须准确，使用 SC003-SH001 首帧锁构图。
shots.reference_frame_status: canonical_highscore_reference_frame_accepted_2026-06-11; r010e01.png approved for SC003-SH001 I2V motion test, director 94 / art 96

composition_lock.zh: 横屏桌面建立特写采用斜上俯角三层构图：旧驿残图占满画面，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处；朱赤红线从下三分之一斜向穿到上三分之一，铜钉和防潮卷轴筒压住节奏；油灯只在左下画外留下暖边，雨滴和油布边缘在右上形成冷湿边界。
composition_lock.en: The tabletop establishing close-up uses an overhead-oblique three-layer composition: the damaged relay map fills the frame, south sits in the lower foreground and the northern border recedes upward; the vermilion cord runs diagonally from the lower third to the upper third, paced by brass pins and a moisture-proof scroll tube; the oil lamp stays just off lower-left as a warm edge, while rain dots and oilcloth at upper-right form a cool wet boundary.

camera_lock.zh: 斜上俯角桌面特写，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处。运镜是低速真实前推，不旋转地图、不升空、不横摇搜索；跟焦只做一次，从南缘线钉到北境水滴。红线始终是物理绳线和政治压力，不变成导航线。
camera_lock.en: Overhead-oblique tabletop close-up, with the southern edge in the lower foreground and the northern border receding upward. Use a slow real-time push only: no map rotation, no crane-up, no searching pan. Make a single focus pull from the southern pin to the northern rain dot. The cord remains physical rope and political pressure, never a navigation line.

lighting_plan.zh: 低位油灯从左下擦过纸面，形成温暖窄侧光，凸出纸纤维、朱赤线绒毛、铜钉氧化边和湿木纹；右上雨夜月白冷反光只点水滴、油布折痕和地图裂缝。四角负补光压暗，保留潮湿暖暗，不做全局提亮。
lighting_plan.en: A low oil lamp from lower-left skims the paper as warm narrow side light, revealing paper fibers, vermilion cord fuzz, oxidized brass-pin edges and wet wood grain. Cool moon-white rain bounce from upper-right only catches droplets, oilcloth folds and map cracks. Corner negative fill preserves humid warm darkness without global brightening.

action_lock.zh: 参考帧构图保持不变：旧驿残图铺满横屏，朱赤红线从下方南缘斜向上方北境，铜钉、防潮卷轴筒、湿木桌沿和油布雨滴分层清楚。0-2 秒几乎静止，只允许油灯轻闪、雨滴敲油布和桌角水珠缓慢坠落；2-5 秒镜头沿红线向北极慢推进，焦点从下方线钉滑到上方北境水滴；5-7 秒停在红线北端和水滴，红线被水打湿略暗，但不发光。
action_lock.en: Keep the reference-frame composition intact: the damaged relay map fills the widescreen frame, the vermilion cord runs from the southern lower edge toward the northern upper depth, and brass pins, moisture-proof scroll tube, wet table edge and oilcloth rain droplets stay clearly layered. From 0-2s the frame is almost still, with only oil-lamp flicker, rain tapping oilcloth and a slow table-corner droplet. From 2-5s the camera pushes very slowly north along the cord, pulling focus from the lower brass pin to the northern rain dot. From 5-7s it settles on the cord north end and droplet; the wet cord darkens slightly but never glows.

shots.rationale: 晏南枝遮面边界、顾怀章旧臣压迫和月白玉片反光已由通过 QC 的首帧锁定。
shots.reference_frame_status: canonical_highscore_reference_frame_accepted_2026-06-11; r011e01.png approved for SC003-SH002 I2V motion test, director 92 / art 96

composition_lock.zh: 桌边双人中近景以红线作画面分割：顾怀章在左侧/灯侧三分位，身体略前压，袖口和旧臣卷轴形成暖色重量；晏南枝在右侧/阴影侧后半步，遮面、冷灰外袍和月白玉片形成冷色焦点。红线横切或斜切两人之间，前景地图边缘、中景双手、背景雨夜油布形成三层空间。
composition_lock.en: The table-edge two-shot uses the red cord as a dividing line: Gu Huaizhang holds the left/lamp-side third, leaning slightly forward, with sleeve and old-minister scroll carrying warm weight; Yan Nanzhi stays half a step back on the right/shadow side, her veil, cold-grey robe and moon-white jade forming the cool focal point. The red cord cuts horizontally or diagonally between them, with foreground map edge, midground hands and background rainy oilcloth as three spatial layers.

camera_lock.zh: 低桌沿锁镜，不追脸、不推成肖像、不做华丽揭面。只允许一次极轻微跟焦和人物呼吸微动；台词由音频/字幕完成，视频只表现弱口部状态和下颌克制，不生成精确口型文字。
camera_lock.en: Locked low table-edge frame: do not chase faces, turn into a portrait, or glamorously reveal Yan. Allow only one very small focus shift and breath-level body motion. Dialogue is handled by audio/subtitles; video only shows weak speaking state and restrained jaw motion, never exact lip-text generation.

lighting_plan.zh: 顾怀章在左侧油灯暖侧光里，老手、朱赤衣纹、卷轴边和地图纸纹被擦亮；晏南枝在右侧阴影里，只吃玉片和雨夜的窄冷边，勾指节、面纱边、下颌线和冷灰衣料。红线附近加深负补光，形成两人之间的政治边界；不要美颜柔光揭全脸。
lighting_plan.en: Gu Huaizhang stays in warm oil-lamp side light on the left, grazing aged hand skin, vermilion robe grain, scroll edge and map paper. Yan Nanzhi stays in right-side shadow, receiving only a narrow cool edge from jade and rainy night on knuckles, veil edge, jawline and cold-grey cloth. Deepen negative fill around the red cord as the political boundary between them; no beauty soft light may reveal her full face.

action_lock.zh: 参考帧构图保持低桌沿双人中近景：顾怀章在左侧灯边压住旧驿图，晏南枝在右侧阴影后半步，红线横在两人之间。0-2 秒锁住两人的手和红线；2-4 秒顾怀章手掌微压地图，袖口轻微下沉，像把证据压到桌面；4-6 秒晏南枝握玉片的指节收紧半拍，下颌在面纱下极小幅度动，表现回答前的克制；6-8 秒焦点从顾怀章压图手滑到晏南枝玉片手，再回到红线边界。
action_lock.en: Keep the low table-edge two-shot from the reference frame: Gu Huaizhang is on the left lamp side pressing the old relay map, Yan Nanzhi is half a step back in right-side shadow, and the red cord lies between them. From 0-2s lock on both hands and the cord. From 2-4s Gu presses the map slightly and his sleeve lowers a fraction, as if pinning the evidence to the table. From 4-6s Yan tightens fingers around the jade by half a beat, with a tiny jaw movement under the veil before answering. From 6-8s focus shifts from Gu pressing hand to Yan jade hand, then returns to the red-cord boundary.

shots.rationale: 血牒细节、停住的手和不接触空隙已由通过 QC 的首帧锁定，避免模型把迟疑改成接卷。
shots.reference_frame_status: canonical_highscore_reference_frame_accepted_2026-06-11; r012e01.png approved for SC003-SH003 I2V motion test, director 94 / art 96

composition_lock.zh: 手部插入特写以红线和血牒形成双重横向压力：前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景半卷血牒从左侧暖灯区推向右侧阴影，晏南枝指尖停在卷轴前一指宽处；右后方月白玉片只露冷反光，顾怀章的手从左侧退开，画面中心是未接触的空隙。
composition_lock.en: The hand insert close-up uses the red cord and genealogy as two horizontal pressures: foreground red cord crosses the lower edge out of focus, the half-rolled blood genealogy slides from warm lamplight at left toward right-side shadow, and Yan fingertips stop one finger-width before it; the moon-white jade appears only as a cool reflection in rear-right, Gu hand retreats from left, and the central subject is the untouched gap.

camera_lock.zh: 桌面高度极小幅推进，终点落在“指尖没有接触血牒”的空隙。推进后保持静止，只允许火光、雨影、纸边停顿和呼吸微动；动作因果必须清楚，血牒不能漂浮，手不能突然跳变。
camera_lock.en: Use a tiny table-height push whose endpoint is the gap where the fingertips do not touch the genealogy. After the push, hold still; allow only fire flicker, rain shadow, paper-edge settling and breath micro-motion. Action causality must stay clear: the genealogy cannot float and hands cannot jump.

lighting_plan.zh: 左侧低位油灯掠过血牒，突出破损纸纤维、潮痕、旧蜡封、暗红旧印和桌面水痕；右侧阴影由月白玉片给指尖和面纱下缘一条窄冷边。暖光到冷光的交界必须落在红线与未接触空隙处，强调她没有接。
lighting_plan.en: A low oil lamp from the left grazes the genealogy, revealing torn paper fibers, moisture stains, old wax seal, dark-red old marks and water trails on the table. The right-side shadow receives only a narrow moon-white jade edge on fingertips and veil lower edge. The warm-to-cool boundary must fall on the red cord and untouched gap, stressing that she has not taken it.

action_lock.zh: 参考帧构图保持手部插入特写：前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景半卷血牒、蜡封和一指宽空隙最清楚，右后方玉片只露小冷反光。0-3 秒顾怀章的手把半卷血牒从左侧暖灯区推过红线 2-3 厘米，纸边和蜡封轻擦湿桌；3-5 秒血牒在晏南枝指尖前停住，顾怀章的手退开；5-9 秒镜头保持在空隙上，晏南枝指尖只有微颤和呼吸带来的阴影，不触碰、不抓卷。
action_lock.en: Keep the hand insert close-up from the reference frame: foreground red cord crosses the lower edge out of focus, midground half-rolled genealogy, wax seal and one-finger gap are the clearest information, and the rear-right jade appears only as a small cool reflection. From 0-3s Gu hand pushes the half-rolled genealogy 2-3 cm from warm left light across the red cord, with paper edge and wax seal scraping the wet table. From 3-5s the genealogy stops before Yan fingertips and Gu hand retreats. From 5-9s the shot holds on the gap; Yan fingertips show only a tiny tremor and breath shadow, never touching or grabbing the scroll.

shots.rationale: 从红线北端到村口封锁线的匹配转场本轮先由通过 QC 的 R013 锁定转场首镜线条方向和曝光下降。
shots.reference_frame_status: canonical_highscore_reference_frame_accepted_2026-06-11; r013e01.png approved for SC003-SH004 I2V transition-start motion test, director 93 / art 96; r014e01.png retained only as optional next-scene match target pending explicit transition approval

composition_lock.zh: 图形过渡特写把红线北端放在上三分之一，水滴压在红线和北境纸纹交界处；油灯暖边在下方逐渐降低，晏南枝遮面剪影只在侧后方虚焦压住画面边缘。终帧需要让红线方向与残阳坳村口封锁线/白蜡旗线条方向可匹配，形成“路”变“封锁”的视觉反转。
composition_lock.en: The graphic transition close-up places the red cord north end in the upper third, with a droplet pressing on the boundary between cord and northern paper grain; the warm lamp edge lowers at the bottom, and Yan veiled silhouette stays out of focus at the rear side, weighting the frame edge. The end frame must match the red-line direction to the Canyangao checkpoint or white-wax flag line, turning road into blockade.

camera_lock.zh: 本轮按 R013 做 I2V 转场首镜，而不是强制 R013->R014 的 FLF2V。运镜是贴近地图的短匹配移动，线条方向为后续剪辑保留；不做梦幻溶解、不全黑、不出现皇座或村口完整画面。若后续要 FLF2V，必须先确认/重做正确的封锁线终帧，再接入尾帧节点。
camera_lock.en: For this pass, use R013 as an I2V transition-start shot, not a forced R013-to-R014 FLF2V. The camera performs a short map-level match move, preserving line direction for a later edit. No dreamy dissolve, no full black, no throne vision, no complete village-gate image inside this shot. If a later FLF2V pass is needed, first approve or rebuild a correct blockade-line last frame before connecting it to the last-frame node.

lighting_plan.zh: 雨夜油灯被压暗，只保留低位暖边照亮红线纤维和水滴边缘；右上月白冷反光给纸裂和晏南枝虚焦剪影一条窄冷边。尾端只让暖暗轻微下降，预留下一镜残阳坳土褐与虫蜡冷白的剪辑入口，不在本镜提前生成圣光封锁线。
lighting_plan.en: The rainy-night oil lamp is dimmed, leaving only a low warm edge on cord fibers and droplet rims. Cool moon-white bounce from upper-right gives paper cracks and Yan out-of-focus silhouette a narrow cold edge. At the tail, humid warm darkness drops slightly to leave an editorial opening for Canyangao earth brown and insect-wax cold white in the next shot; this shot must not generate sacred checkpoint light early.

action_lock.zh: 参考帧构图保持红线北端特写：红线北端和线钉在上三分之一，雨滴压在朱赤线和北境纸纹交界，油灯暖边低而暗，晏南枝遮面剪影只在远侧边缘虚焦。0-3 秒雨滴在红线纤维上变重，朱赤线被水打湿更深；3-6 秒镜头贴地图高度沿线端做短距离匹配移动，纸裂和水滴边缘保持清楚；6-9 秒曝光轻微下落，雨声准备切到人声，画面仍停留在南方红线密室，不提前跳到村口。
action_lock.en: Keep the reference-frame close-up of the red cord north end: the cord end and pin sit near the upper third, a rain droplet presses on the boundary between vermilion fiber and northern paper grain, the oil-lamp warm edge is low and dim, and Yan veiled silhouette is only an out-of-focus far-edge weight. From 0-3s the droplet grows heavier on the cord fibers and the wet vermilion darkens. From 3-6s the camera makes a short map-level match move along the cord end while paper cracks and droplet rim stay readable. From 6-9s exposure lowers slightly and rain sound prepares to cut into crowd voice, but the image remains inside the southern red-line room and does not jump to the village gate early.

shots.rationale: 村口、旧井、药屋和出口的相对位置必须准确。
白册官吏和村民层级需要参考，避免官吏人类化。
沈维桑体貌、左肩和眼线判断需要角色/地点参考。
儿童表演和草药袋亲情锚点需要参考约束。
罗青禾挡身位和官吏复眼高度需要构图锁定。
沈维桑半真话、脚勾草药袋和压弓弦需要参考帧。
白册文字和虫蜡纹必须精确，应用静帧/遮罩重绘或后期文字。
清明香、桌裂缝和三人反应需要参考帧保持空间关系。
村口到药屋的烟线转场需要起止空间一致。
暗格构图、晏南枝遮面状态和门外爪足需要参考。
罗青禾抓药动作和空间保护线需要参考。
柜内外双层近景和低声对白需要身份参考。
旧驿暗号和日月残纹应精确绘制或遮罩重绘。
叉矛影、药柜和罗青禾位置需要参考以保持门内外压力。
旧井、药屋封门牌和沈维桑视线需保持地理连续。
旧驿暗号摆上桌和官吏层级必须可读。
人群炸开但层级必须清楚，使用参考帧。
疑童白册标记和草药袋特写需要精确，建议参考帧加局部重绘。
白翳极高、洁净和无尘入场必须使用角色参考。
白翳擦针和制度推理是角色核心行为，需要参考。
白册旁注文字必须准确，不能交给视频模型随机生成。
旧井封锁收紧需要地点和虫兵参考。
白翳、沈照眠和沈维桑扣弦需要同一构图约束。
扣弦到松弦的动作终点是本集按钮，建议 FLF2V 锁定终点。

sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.reported_issue: 角色一致性仍未满足，包括身高差设定。
sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.frame_use_rule: Do not use current SC002 R005-R009 candidates for video production; regenerate at 4096x2304 after identity and same-ground height-scale relock.
sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.prompt_lock: 2026-06-11 用户视觉 QC 退回后的重生硬锁：SC002 参考帧必须先让角色身份和身高差一眼成立。使用同一泥地/同一车道地平线：C025 村民为普通人族低位基准，C017 奴兵为 175-185cm 代表体量且保留五指硬化人手与低位金钱尾辫，C016B 粮税虫吏为 195-205cm 画面代表值并只开册下令，C018 纯虫族小兵为 215-230cm 站立等效并只持短矛/钩镰封路。所有脚底、靴底、爪足或地面接触点必须落在同一可读泥地平面；如果角色低伏或弯腰，仍必须通过肩高、头壳、兵器、门框或旁站基准证明其真实等效身高。
sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.negative_lock: 不要继续使用 2026-06-11 被用户退回的 SC002 候选帧作为通过参考；不要让官吏、奴兵、纯虫族小兵和普通人族同身高；不要让 C016B 站桌子、检查台、粮袋、台阶或车板造高；不要让 C017 变纯虫族爪手或普通人族士兵；不要让 C018 缺兵器、搬粮、扣腕或开册；不要用透视、裁切、前景放大、低伏遮挡来掩盖身高差。

scale_consistency_lock.source: bible/characters.md functional-role height locks plus user visual QC rejection on 2026-06-11
required_scale_ladder: C025 ordinary human baseline: children 105-145cm, youths 145-165cm, ordinary adults 160-190cm, elders visually shorter from stoop.
C017 mixed slave soldier: canon range 170-200cm; SC002 representative should read 175-185cm and always below the selected C016/C018 on screen.
C016 low insect official: canon range 190-210cm; representative screen height about 200cm, taller than villagers and C017 by true body height, narrow and non-combat.
C018 pure insect infantry: canon range 200-230cm; representative standing-equivalent about 220cm, visibly taller and more alien than C016/C017/C025, armed perimeter only.
C019 heavy insect soldier: canon range 220-260cm; representative about 245cm, broader and heavier than C018, shield-wall or gate-pressure only.
scale_consistency_lock.same_ground_rule: Feet, soles, claws or ground-contact points must align on one visible baseline or one continuous muddy ground plane; height difference may not be created by tables, platforms, stairs, grain sacks, carts, threshold steps, foreground enlargement, lens distortion or crop tricks.
scale_consistency_lock.camera_rule: For cards, include one same-ground scale lineup strip with ruler ticks or doorway/human baseline. For reference frames, keep camera distance and ground plane readable enough that C025/C017/C016/C018/C019 hierarchy can be checked without guessing.
scale_consistency_lock.role_boundary_rule: C016 opens/registers/orders, C017 grips/moves grain with five hardened human fingers, C018 blocks routes with weapons, C019 guards gates with shield mass, C025 remains ordinary humans with no insect features.
rejection_rules: reject if C016, C017, C018 and C025 read as the same height class
reject if C017 becomes a pure insect, metal-glove guard, ordinary human soldier or loses the low money-tail braid/hardened five-finger hand
reject if C016 becomes a human accountant, blue high official, priest, slave soldier or combat soldier
reject if C018 lacks reverse-jointed legs, claw feet, pure-insect body or visible spear/hook-sickle when guarding
reject if C019 does not read broader/heavier than C018 when present
reject if C025 civilians gain insect traits or military gear
reject if apparent height comes from platform, table, stairs, grain sacks, cart bed, foreground scale or crouch hiding true standing-equivalent height
